title: Uniface component
text: Uniface component A Main Development Object that defines an executable part of an application, including its data structure, behavior, and layout (if applicable). Uniface provides specialized types of components for different purposes, such as server pages for web user interface, and services for back end processing. Synonyms: component Related Links Components Uniface application components are interchangeable software modules that handle application processing. They are technology-independent, so compiled components can be run on any operating system. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
